indexes.name: agent_state_durations_day_agent_state_uniq
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX agent_state_durations_day_agent_state_uniq ON public.agent_state_durations USING btree (day, agent_name, state_key)

indexes.name: agent_state_durations_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX agent_state_durations_pkey ON public.agent_state_durations USING btree (id)

indexes.name: connections_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX connections_pkey ON public.connections USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_connections_tx
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_connections_tx ON public.connections USING btree (transaction_id)

indexes.name: $id|$md5
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX "$id|$md5" ON public.contacts USING btree ("$id", "$md5")

indexes.name: contacts_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX contacts_pkey ON public.contacts USING btree ("$id")

indexes.name: idx_contacts_campaign
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_contacts_campaign ON public.contacts USING btree (campaign_id)

indexes.name: idx_contacts_campaign_trim
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_contacts_campaign_trim ON public.contacts USING btree (btrim(campaign_id))

indexes.name: idx_contacts_id_campaign
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_contacts_id_campaign ON public.contacts USING btree (id, campaign_id)

indexes.name: inbound_calls_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX inbound_calls_pkey ON public.inbound_calls USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_recordings_connection
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_recordings_connection ON public.recordings USING btree (connection_id)

indexes.name: idx_recordings_started_desc
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_recordings_started_desc ON public.recordings USING btree (started DESC)

indexes.name: recordings_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX recordings_pkey ON public.recordings USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_transactions_contact_date
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_contact_date ON public.transactions USING btree (contact_id, fired)

indexes.name: idx_transactions_date
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_date ON public.transactions USING btree (fired)

indexes.name: idx_transactions_login_norm
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_login_norm ON public.transactions USING btree (lower(btrim(("user_loginName")::text)))

indexes.name: idx_transactions_status
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_status ON public.transactions USING btree (status)

indexes.name: idx_transactions_status_detail
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_status_detail ON public.transactions USING btree (status_detail)

indexes.name: idx_transactions_user_date
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_user_date ON public.transactions USING btree ("user_loginName", fired)

indexes.name: transactions_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX transactions_pkey ON public.transactions USING btree (id)
